name: Cursor
desc: 2026年最受欢迎的AI代码编辑器，基于Claude 3.5 Sonnet，多行预测和智能重构能力最强。
desc_en: The most popular AI code editor in 2026, powered by Claude 3.5 Sonnet, with best-in-class multi-line prediction and intelligent refactoring.

name: GitHub Copilot
desc: 业界最成熟的AI编程助手，市场占用率第一，与VS Code深度集成。
desc_en: The most mature AI coding assistant in the industry, #1 market share, deep integration with VS Code.

name: Claude Code
desc: Anthropic官方CLI工具，代码审查和复杂任务处理能力出众，支持直接操作文件系统。

name: Windsurf
desc: Codeium出品，提供大量免费额度，Flow AI功能覆盖常见编程场景。
desc_en: By Codeium, offers generous free tier, Flow AI covers common programming scenarios.

name: JetBrains AI
desc: 与IntelliJ等JetBrains IDE原生集成，适合已经使用JetBrains产品的开发者。
desc_en: Natively integrated with IntelliJ and JetBrains IDEs, ideal for developers already using JetBrains products.

name: Tabnine
desc: 支持本地运行的AI代码补全工具，数据全程本地处理，隐私保护优秀。
desc_en: AI code completion tool supporting local deployment, all data processed locally with excellent privacy protection.

name: Replit Agent
desc: 能自主完成整个项目开发流程，从需求到部署一键完成，云端开发体验流畅。
desc_en: Autonomously handles entire project development workflow, from requirements to deployment in one click.

name: Cody
desc: 基于代码库语义的AI助手，代码理解和导航能力强大，适合大型代码库。
desc_en: By Sourcegraph, AI assistant based on codebase semantics, powerful code understanding for large codebases.

name: Amazon CodeWhisperer
desc: 亚马逊出品，与AWS服务深度集成，提供代码安全扫描，个人用户免费。
desc_en: By Amazon, deep integration with AWS services, provides code security scanning, free for individual users.

name: CodeRabbit
desc: 专注于代码审查和PR自动化的AI工具，PR审查体验业界领先。
desc_en: AI tool focused on code review and PR automation, industry-leading PR review experience.

name: Supermaven
desc: 以超低延迟著称的AI代码补全工具，补全速度业界最快，适合追求效率的开发者。
desc_en: AI code completion tool known for ultra-low latency, fastest completion speed in the industry.

name: Phind
desc: AI编程搜索引擎，专注于解答编程问题，完全免费使用。
desc_en: AI programming search engine focused on answering coding questions, completely free to use.

name: Blackbox AI
desc: 能理解并提取GitHub代码的AI工具，支持代码片段搜索和API集成。
desc_en: AI tool that understands and extracts GitHub code, supports code snippet search and API integration.

name: Aider
desc: 开源AI编程助手，支持多语言，命令行友好，适合远程开发。
desc_en: Open-source AI coding assistant, multi-language support, CLI-friendly, great for remote development.

name: Continue
desc: 开源的AI代码助手，VS Code和JetBrains扩展，支持本地部署和自定义模型。
desc_en: Open-source AI code assistant, VS Code and JetBrains extensions, supports local deployment and custom models.

name: Devin
desc: AI软件工程师，可以独立完成整个项目开发和调试。
desc_en: AI software engineer that can independently complete entire project development and debugging.

name: SWE-agent
desc: 普林斯顿开源SWE-bench测试Agent，性能优秀。

name: Fmemo
desc: 中文AI代码助手，专注中文开发者群体。
desc_en: Chinese AI code assistant focused on Chinese developer community.

name: CodeGeex
desc: AI21出品的代码生成工具，支持多种IDE。
desc_en: By AI21, code generation tool supporting multiple IDEs.

name: Junie
desc: JetBrains最新AI编码助手，深度集成IDE。
